ownership.EyeOfTerror/Warmaster/eye_of_terror/nati: native code mission package and validation boundary

rules: Ceraxia owns intent, priorities, constraints, and mission success conditions only
Skitarii owns repository exploration, detailed planning, implementation, verification, and repair
native code runs contain exactly one skitarii_mission execution step and no worker_plan or dispatch directory
production Skitarii missions require a valid persisted Ceraxia leadership directive
legacy code-worker ports 7014-7020 and compatibility code brigades must not be registered or started
LegacyMechanicum remains compatibility/shared runtime until a legacy worker or relay is intentionally migrated
EyeOfTerror/Mechanicum must not import LegacyMechanicum runtime directly
worker migration requires an explicit adapter contract and local boundary test
